data: Revise how to confirm and understand instructions at work

message: Let's revise how to confirm and understand instructions at work.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: Remember the structure you learned:

"If I understand correctly, I need to [task] by [deadline]."

Repeating back an instruction shows your manager that you are attentive and clear.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/850d2e42-9557-477d-a0aa-dd810f885af0-47.-Understanding-Instructions.jpg
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now let's practice using this structure again.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/850d2e42-9557-477d-a0aa-dd810f885af0-47.-Understanding-Instructions.jpg
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to repeat back an instruction

1.If I understand correctly, I need to update the sales data by noon.
2.I will update the data but I am not sure about the exact time.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to confirm a task with a deadline

1.My manager said something about the meeting but I forgot the details.
2.If I understand correctly, I need to arrange the meeting by tomorrow morning.

Correct answer: 2
If&&I&&understand&&correctly, I&&need&&to submit the&&budget&&report by Friday&&afternoon.
If&&I&&understand&&correctly, I&&need&&to review the&&contract by Thursday&&morning.
If&&I&&understand&&correctly, I&&need&&to finalise the&&presentation by tomorrow&&noon.
If&&I&&understand&&correctly, I&&need&&to update the&&project&&plan by Monday&&evening.
If&&I&&understand&&correctly, I&&need&&to respond&&to the&&client by this&&evening.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. Your manager gives you a new task with a specific deadline. How do you confirm you understood?'

'2. A senior colleague explains a process to you. How do you confirm the key steps?'

'3. Your supervisor asks you to prepare a summary by the end of the week. How do you confirm the instruction?'

'4. Your team leader assigns you a task with multiple steps. How do you confirm what you need to do?'

'5. Your manager gives you a last-minute instruction. How do you confirm the task and deadline?'"
